description: Base SOFR path as a piecewise-linear interpolation of an initial / peak / final Fed-policy-rate triple anchored at loan_start_date.
formula_pseudocode: for t in 0..total_months_assumption: if t <= months_to_peak: r(t) = initial + (peak - initial) * (t / months_to_peak); else: r(t) = peak + (final - peak) * ((t - months_to_peak) / (total_months_assumption - months_to_peak));

initial.description: Annualised rate at t=0 (decimal, e.g. 0.045 for 4.5%).

total_months_assumption.description: Horizon over which the curve is defined.

source_citations: Federal Reserve H.15 / SOFR daily releases (FRED series SOFR).
FOMC Summary of Economic Projections dot-plot for the policy-rate path.
V1 inline FED_PATH in SWAPS-1LOAN-WHAT-IF-3-INP-FINAL.json (preserved verbatim by india-us-textiles.json for Iteration 1).
